name: byos-agent-optional-pattern
description: scaffold_skill.py always emits prism: block; agent is optional hint. validate_skill.py treats missing agent as non-error; validates agent IF present (warning only). prism: block = opt-in to discovery, agent = informational hint only.

name: byos-imperative-skill-instruction
description: _format_discovered_skills uses MANDATORY imperative language: 'MANDATORY: You MUST invoke relevant skills using the Skill tool before completing your task.' Test updated to assert MANDATORY present (not absent).

name: byos-skill-relevance-threshold
description: _format_discovered_skills() presents skills as available-if-relevant with 1% threshold — agent decides based on relevance, not forced to invoke all. Updated wording: 'The following skills are available. Invoke any skill if there is even a 1% chance it is relevant.'

name: byos-skill-invocation-threshold
description: _format_discovered_skills wording: present skills as available-if-relevant with 1% threshold, not unconditional MANDATORY force-all. Confirmed: MANDATORY force-all causes wasted Skill calls every step; weak 'review and invoke' causes agents to skip all skills. The 1% threshold balances both failure modes.

content: Skill command files follow validate-cli.md pattern: frontmatter description, Usage section, Execute bash block with CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT, per-command docs with examples, Storage and Dependencies sections.

prism-bug skill pattern: skill captures state file, session transcript JSONL, gate YAML, git context, plugin version — uploads full transcript as Gist via gh gist create, creates GitHub Issue via gh issue create --repo siegeon/.prism with labels bug,prism-session — each source handled independently so missing files are noted but not fatal

description: prism-bug.py transcript parser used top-level type field but Claude Code JSONL uses role+content[] blocks.
resolution: Iterate content array, extract blocks by type (text/tool_use/tool_result) from each role entry.

name: create-issue-label-fallback
description: prism-bug create_issue() label fallback: try with labels; if rc\!=0 retry without 'prism-session'; if still fails retry with no labels — handles repos where label doesn't exist.

content: using-brain SKILL.md teaches Claude automatic Brain query patterns: explain before editing unfamiliar files, search before answering codebase questions, graph for dependency tracing, search for error debugging.

name: skills-directive-in-core-steps
description: All 6 core-steps/*.md now have a ## Skills section directing agents to use the Skill tool before implementing manually. _format_discovered_skills() emits a '## Available Skills' header. Tests: test_core_steps_have_skills_directive (spec conformance) and test_skills_section_header_in_assembled_instruction.

name: skill-discovery-diagnostic-logging
description: discover_prism_skills logs to stderr with [skill-discovery] prefix: paths scanned, skills found/skipped, and total count. Enables debugging of skill pipeline without affecting stdout.
